Welcome home
Our Story

Where the wild meets refined comfort

From the moment you arrive at our gates, Base Bush Lounge welcomes you into a serene and stylish world that blends natural beauty with contemporary comfort. Sweeping timber decks, a sparkling pool and uninterrupted views of the surrounding hills set the scene for an unforgettable getaway.

Whether you are seeking a tranquil weekend retreat, an adventurous bush escape, or an elegant setting to gather with friends and family, every corner of the lounge has been crafted to help you slow down, breathe in nature, and feel at home.

Read our story
The Experience

Everything you need to unwind

Thoughtful touches and natural luxury, all in one peaceful bushveld setting.

Serene Atmosphere

Wake to birdsong and golden light. A calm, unhurried escape far from the noise of the city.

Complimentary Wi-Fi

Stay connected when you choose to. Reliable high-speed Wi-Fi throughout the property.

24/7 Security

Round-the-clock on-site security and controlled access for total peace of mind.

Camping & Hiking

Pitch a tent under the stars or set out on scenic trails through pristine bush.

Pool & Sun Deck

A glistening pool wrapped by an expansive timber deck made for lazy afternoons.

A restaurant serving game meat, barbecue, and international & local delicacies.

The Restaurant
at the lounge

Conferencing & Events

A striking venue for business & celebrations

Our purpose-built, glass-walled conference facility brings the calm of the bush indoors. Light-filled and elegantly finished with statement marble interiors, it is the perfect setting for corporate retreats, strategy sessions, workshops, weddings and milestone celebrations.

Trade the boardroom for the bushveld — and watch ideas flow in a space designed to inspire.

Home — About

Our Story

Welcome

A serene & stylish bushveld retreat

Base Bush Lounge was born from a simple idea: that true luxury is found in stillness. Set against rolling hills and open bush, our venue blends the raw beauty of the African landscape with the warmth of contemporary design.

Rich timber decks stretch toward the horizon, framing a tranquil pool and shaded lounges where guests gather to share sundowners, stories and the quiet magic of the wild. Every detail — from the handpicked furnishings to the soft glow of our lanterns at dusk — has been considered to create a space that feels both elevated and effortlessly relaxed.

Here, days unfold at their own pace. Swim, read, wander the trails, or simply watch the light shift over the bush. This is your invitation to disconnect, reconnect, and breathe.

Crafted comfort
What Sets Us Apart

Natural luxury, thoughtfully done

Designed by nature

An architecture that opens to the bush — every space framed by trees, sky and uninterrupted views.

Peace & privacy

A secluded setting with 24/7 security, so you can truly relax and let the world fade away.

Effortless stays

Listed on Airbnb & Booking.com with flexible, multi-currency payments for travellers from anywhere.

Plan your stay
Home — Stay

Stay With Us

Relax & recline
The Lounge & Deck

Settle into the bush in style

Our generous timber decks are the heart of Base Bush Lounge — wrapping around a sparkling pool and flowing into shaded lounges dressed in warm, contemporary furnishings. It is the perfect place to sip a sundowner, share a meal with loved ones, or simply soak in the panoramic bush views.

Cosy, characterful and bathed in golden light, the space feels like a home in the wild — refined, welcoming and entirely your own.

Comfort & Convenience

Stay connected throughout the property — ideal for remote work, sharing memories, or streaming under the stars.

02

24/7 Security

On-site security and controlled access keep you safe and at ease, day and night.

03

Pool & Sun Deck

A refreshing pool surrounded by expansive decking, loungers and shaded seating.

04

Serene Surrounds

Total tranquillity in an unspoilt bushveld setting — the ultimate reset for body and mind.

Home — Conferencing

Conferencing & Events

Refined interiors
The Venue

Where business meets the bush

Our standalone conference facility is a light-filled, glass-walled space that opens onto the surrounding bush — bringing nature into every meeting. Inside, dramatic marble finishes and elegant lighting create an atmosphere that is both professional and unforgettable.

Fully equipped for modern presentations with a 100-inch TV screen, the venue adapts effortlessly to corporate strategy sessions, team retreats, workshops, product launches, weddings and private celebrations.

Boardroom-style, with 100" screen
Seats dozens of delegates
Why Host Here

Everything your event needs

01

100″ Presentation TV

A giant 100-inch TV screen makes slideshows, video and hybrid calls crisp and effortless for every delegate in the room.

02

Connected & Equipped

Complimentary high-speed Wi-Fi throughout — ideal for presentations, hybrid meetings and staying in touch.

03

Striking Setting

A glass-walled hall framed by trees and sky, with sophisticated marble interiors that impress every guest.

04

Secure & Private

Gated access and 24/7 security let your delegates focus, in complete peace and privacy.

Find Us

How to reach the lounge

Just 15km from Gaborone in tranquil Mokolodi — an easy drive, a world away.

Mokolodi, South-East District, Botswana
±15 km from Gaborone

Home — Dining

The Restaurant

Opening Soon

A feast of the bush
coming soon

We can hardly wait to welcome you to our table. Soon, the Base Bush Lounge restaurant will open its doors — serving all kinds of delicacies in a setting as memorable as the meal itself. Expect bold, honest flavours, generous hospitality, and a celebration of both the African bush and the wider world.

On the Menu

What we'll be serving

Game Meat

Authentic bushveld flavours — tender, slow-cooked game prepared with respect for the land.

Barbecue

Smoky, flame-grilled favourites cooked over open coals beneath the African sky.

International Cuisine

A world of refined plates, bringing global classics to the heart of the bush.

Local Cuisine

Beloved regional dishes that taste of home — comforting, hearty and full of heritage.

Be first to know when we open
Home — Activities

Things To Do

Adventure & Rest

Make the bush your playground

From starlit camping to scenic trails — or doing wonderfully little at all.

01

Camping

Sleep beneath a canopy of stars. Set up camp in our peaceful grounds and fall asleep to the sounds of the wild — a true back-to-nature experience with all the comforts close at hand.

02

Hiking

Lace up and explore scenic bush trails winding through the hills. Spot birdlife, breathe the fresh air, and take in sweeping views around every bend.

03

Poolside Relaxation

Cool off in the pool, stretch out on a lounger, and let the afternoon drift by on our sun-soaked deck.

04

Serene Escapes

Sometimes the best activity is none at all. Unwind in the lounge, watch the sunset, and rediscover stillness in the quiet of the bush.

Ready for your adventure?

Camp, hike, swim or simply relax — your bushveld escape is just a message away.

Plan your visit
